loop1.title: Voltage Live Health
loop1.note: Showing current metrics — per-phase current columns are not present in the asset's schema, so the card is using available voltage/power data as a structural placeholder for the current health view.

loop1.title: Voltage History
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD trends; per-phase harmonic order data (H5/H7) is not available in the current asset schema.

loop1.title: Current Live Health
loop1.note: Showing current values using active power columns as the best available proxy for phase distribution, as direct current columns are not present in the asset's schema.
